name: external_backend
description: Cross-SDK fixtures for the inbound OPA/Cedar external policy backend (ADR-4). merge_cases pin the DENY-WINS merge plus fail-closed and shadow (observe-only) semantics: a deny from EITHER the local pipeline or the backend blocks; a backend error/timeout is a deny in enforce mode; shadow mode never blocks. provenance_cases pin the backend identity + effective-policy-hash computation. Both SDK harnesses (sdk/tests/unit/external-backend-conformance.test.ts, sdk-python/tests/test_external_backend_conformance.py) run mergeExternalBackendDecision / merge_external_backend_decision and backendProvenance / backend_provenance over every case and must agree byte for byte. A divergence is a release blocker.

merge_cases.desc: local allow + backend allow (enforce) -> allow
local allow + backend allow (shadow) -> allow
local allow + backend deny (enforce) -> backend blocks
local allow + backend deny (shadow) -> observe-only, allow
local allow + backend error (enforce) -> fail-closed deny
local allow + backend error (shadow) -> observe-only, allow
local allow + backend timeout (enforce) -> fail-closed deny
local allow + backend timeout (shadow) -> observe-only, allow
local redact + backend allow (enforce) -> redact stands
local redact + backend allow (shadow) -> redact stands
local redact + backend deny (enforce) -> block escalation (deny wins over redact)
local redact + backend deny (shadow) -> observe-only, redact stands
local redact + backend error (enforce) -> fail-closed block
local redact + backend error (shadow) -> observe-only, redact stands
local redact + backend timeout (enforce) -> fail-closed block
local redact + backend timeout (shadow) -> observe-only, redact stands
local block + backend allow (enforce) -> backend allow never downgrades a local block
local block + backend allow (shadow) -> block stands
local block + backend deny (enforce) -> block stands, backend did not cause it
local block + backend deny (shadow) -> block stands
local block + backend error (enforce) -> block stands
local block + backend error (shadow) -> block stands
local block + backend timeout (enforce) -> block stands
local block + backend timeout (shadow) -> block stands

provenance_cases.desc: OPA with no name/policy: identity from type+host, hash from type|url
Cedar with name + policy text: identity from name, hash from policy text
OPA with empty name + policy text: identity falls back to type+host, hash from policy text
